header.title: Earth Insights
landing.hero.title: Turn Satellite Data into Actionable Insights
landing.hero.subtitle: Upload ground truth data, analyze environmental metrics, and visualize change — all in one powerful dashboard.
landing.features.title: Powerful Analysis at Your Fingertips
landing.features.subtitle: From vegetation health to urban expansion, get the data you need to make informed decisions.
landing.features.coordinateInputDesc: Enter lat/long to analyze any region on Earth.
landing.features.metricComputationDesc: Calculate key spectral indices like NDVI, NDWI, and NDBI.
landing.features.interactiveVisualsDesc: Time-series charts and satellite vs. ground truth scatter plots.
landing.features.exportEasilyDesc: Download your computed metrics in CSV format for research.
landing.whyUs.title: The Ultimate Environmental Data Platform
landing.whyUs.subtitle: We provide a seamless bridge between complex satellite imagery and clear, actionable environmental intelligence.
landing.whyUs.point1: Built on Google Earth Engine for robust, scalable analysis.
landing.whyUs.point2: Accurate, fast environmental insights to power your research.
landing.whyUs.point3: User-friendly and powerful visualization for intuitive data exploration.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or want to work with us? Fill out the form below.

contact.submitted.title: Thank You!

predict.title: Predictive Insights
predict.description: Get AI-powered predictions for your location. Start by entering a location description or coordinates.
predict.weather.title: Weather Forecast
predict.weather.description: Get the current weather and a 24-hour forecast.
predict.crop.title: Crop Planning
predict.crop.description: Receive recommendations on suitable crops and planting schedules.
predict.irrigation.title: Irrigation Schedule
predict.irrigation.description: Get AI-based advice on when and how much to water your fields.
predict.soil.title: Soil Moisture
predict.soil.description: Predict the current volumetric water content in the soil.
predict.yield.title: Crop Yield
predict.yield.description: Forecast potential crop yield for the selected location.

dashboard.poi.amazon.name: Amazon Rainforest
dashboard.poi.amazon.description: Explore the lush greenery of the world's largest tropical rainforest.
dashboard.poi.sahara.name: Sahara Desert
dashboard.poi.sahara.description: Monitor the arid conditions of the vast desert spanning across Africa.
dashboard.poi.nile.name: Nile River Delta
dashboard.poi.nile.description: Analyze the agricultural lands of this fertile river delta flowing into the Mediterranean.
dashboard.poi.himalayas.name: Himalayas
dashboard.poi.himalayas.description: View the snow and ice of the world's highest mountain range, home to Mount Everest.

dashboard.metrics.description: Detailed metrics including spectral indices, bands, and land cover statistics.
dashboard.metrics.table.insightPlacehold: Click the magic wand to generate an AI insight for this metric.

dashboard.viz.description: Interactive plots of environmental metrics and spectral bands.
dashboard.viz.comparisonDescription: Comparison of Satellite NDVI vs. Ground Truth Data

cropAdvisor.title: AI Crop Advisor
cropAdvisor.description: Fill in your farm's location and climate to get a data-driven crop recommendation. Soil and moisture data will be fetched automatically.
cropAdvisor.currentCrop.label: Current or Previous Crop (Optional)
cropAdvisor.climate.label: Local Climate Description
cropAdvisor.climate.placeholder: Describe the typical weather, e.g., 'Temperate with four seasons'
cropAdvisor.toast.success.title: Recommendation Generated
cropAdvisor.result.title: AI Recommendation
cropAdvisor.result.description: Based on your input and real-time satellite data, here is our suggestion.
cropAdvisor.result.alternativeDesc: Another good option for your conditions could be {crop}.
